name.ja: スピード・キャリアー

requirement.en: During your Main Phase that you Normal or Special Summoned this card.

effect.en: Special Summon 1 Level 3 or 4 WIND Attribute Warrior Type Effect Monster with 1000 or more ATK from your Graveyard face-up to your field. Then, you can add 1 "Speed Up" or "Speed Turn" from your Graveyard to your hand. This turn, you can only attack with Warrior Type monsters.
